channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: World Cup 2026 Results: Argentina, Colombia, and Egypt Advance; Cape Verde, Australia, and Ghana Exit
item.description: In the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32, Colombia secured a 1-0 victory over Ghana, with Argentina and Egypt also advancing to the Round of 16. Colombia dominated the match at Arrowhead Stadium but man...

item.title: Ireland edges out Wallabies in tense Nations Championship opener
item.description: In a tightly contested rugby match at Sydney Football Stadium, Ireland secured a 33-31 victory over Australia in the Nations Championship opener. The game, marked by relentless pressure and pivotal mo...

item.title: Kerala CM Announces Renewal of Journalist R. Rajagopal's Passport After Intervention
item.description: The article reports that journalist R. Rajagopal, former editor of The Telegraph, has successfully renewed his passport after intervention by Kerala Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan. Initially, Rajagopal...

item.title: Nursing Graduate Balances Motherhood and Studies
item.description: Xomilissa, a young nursing graduate, made headlines by attending her university graduation ceremony with her newborn baby, showcasing her ability to balance motherhood and academics. The 22-year-old w...

item.title: Ondo State APC Chairmen Demand Transparency in National Assembly Candidate Selection
item.description: Chairmen of Ondo State's 18 Local Government Areas have raised concerns over the All Progressives Congress (APC) National Working Committee's (NWC) candidate list for national assembly seats. They arg...

item.title: Sports scandals and investigations dominate headlines as ECB probes incidents involving athletes
item.description: The news landscape is dominated by multiple sports-related controversies and investigations. England's cricket team faces potential disciplinary action after captain Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson missed...

item.title: Pakistan-Turkey deepen economic ties through investment partnerships and digital collaboration
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan emphasized the need to strengthen Pakistan-Turkey economic cooperation during their high-level meetings in Istanbul. The discus...

item.title: Tanzania's Government Plans to List Up to Five State Firms on DSE
item.description: Tanzania's government has announced plans to list up to five state-owned enterprises on the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange by the end of the 2026/27 financial year. This initiative, revealed during the ...

item.title: Islamabad High Court directs jail authorities to submit report on Imran Khan and Bushra Bibi detention conditions
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has directed the superintendent of Adiala Jail to submit a detailed report regarding the alleged solitary confinement of former Prime Minister Imran Khan and his wife Bu...

item.title: Historic Soapbox Auto Race at Salisbury, Maryland in 1940
item.description: The Soapbox Auto Race, also known as the Soap Box Derby, is a youth racing program in the United States where children build and race unpowered, gravity-driven cars down hills. Originating in 1933 whe...

item.title: Pau and Iyah Mina's Dynamic on 'Everybody Sing'
item.description: The article discusses a notable moment from the Philippine television show 'Everybody Sing' where host Pau calls contestant Iyah Mina 'binata,' a term that has sparked discussions among viewers. The r...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte Begins with NBI and House Officials as Witnesses

item.title: Broncos' Defeat Leaves Finals Contention in Doubt
item.description: The Brisbane Broncos' recent loss to the Cronulla Sharks has cast serious doubt on their chances of securing a finals berth in the 2026 NRL season. Missing key players like Reece Walsh and Payne Haas,...

item.description: Watu Credit Tanzania has significantly expanded its financing for gas-powered three-wheelers (Bajajs) and introduced electric units, enabling thousands of young Tanzanians to enter the transport secto...

item.title: Pakistan and Turkey Strengthen Infrastructure and Digital Cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif of Pakistan engaged in high-level discussions with Turkish business leaders and Turkcell CEO Ali Taha Koç during his official visit to Istanbul. The talks focused on enha...

item.title: Three-Year-Old Boy Faces Long Rehabilitation After Crocodile Attack at Zoo
item.description: A three-year-old boy who was attacked by a crocodile in a zoo enclosure has undergone five surgeries and faces an extended rehabilitation process, according to his parents. The incident occurred on 18...

item.title: Hollywoodbets Durban July 2026: Saso’s Marquee Experience showcases African-inspired theme with music, fashion, and cuisine

item.title: Mistral AI: A Comprehensive Overview of Its Role in the Tech Landscape

item.title: Kogi State Security Forces Recover 1,000 Stolen Livestock
item.description: The Kogi State Government, working with the Nigerian Army's 12 Brigade and other security agencies, successfully recovered about 1,000 stolen livestock from criminal networks. The operation targeted r...
